use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for forms and interactive interfaces
Destructive variant for delete or dangerous actions
Outline buttons for secondary actions in UI flows
Ghost buttons for subtle, minimal interface designs
Icon buttons for compact toolbar and navigation elements
ai_summary: A polymorphic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with standard accessibility features including focus-visible ring states and disabled mode. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with standard color transitions on hover.
